hypotheses:
In_dec : forall (v : GRAPH.vertices G) (vs : list (GRAPH.vertices G)),
or (L.In v vs) (not (L.In v vs))
obligation.goal: ex (fun p : list (GRAPH.vertices G) => path v v0 p)

proofs: assert (last_last_lemma : forall (l : list V) (d : V), last l (last l d) = last l d).

attempts:
assert (last_last_lemma : forall (l : list V) (d : V), last l (last l d) = last l d).
{ induction l; simpl; auto. }
induction w as [| a w IH].
- inversion WALK; subst; exists nil; apply path_refl.
- pose proof (walk_last v v0 (a::w) WALK) as Hlast1. inversion WALK as [ | ? ? ? Hedge Hwalk | ]; subst; try discriminate. apply (walk_last v a w) in Hwalk. simpl in Hlast1, Hwalk. rewrite Hwalk, (last_last_lemma w v), <- Hwalk in Hlast1. subst a. apply (IH v v0 Hwalk).

refine (let vertices := GRAPH.vertices G in
let strip (a : vertices) : forall (b : vertices) (p : list vertices), path v b p -> L.In a p -> {p' : list vertices | path v a p' /\ ~ L.In a p'} :=
  fix rec b p hp (Hin : L.In a p) {struct hp} : {p' : list vertices | path v a p' /\ ~ L.In a p'} :=
    match hp with
    | path_refl => match Hin with end
    | path_step b0 b1 p' He Hp Hnotin =>
      match Hin with
      | L.In_eq _ _ => exist _ p' (conj Hp Hnotin)
      | L.In_cons _ _ Hin' => rec b1 p' Hp Hin'
      end
    end
in let walk_to_path (x : vertices) (l : list vertices) (hw : walk v x l) {struct l} : exists p : list vertices, path v x p :=
  match hw with
  | walk_refl => ex_intro _ nil (path_refl v)
  | walk_step x0 x1 l' hedge hwalk' =>
    match walk_to_path x1 l' hwalk' with
    | ex_intro _ p' hp' =>
      match In_dec x1 p' with
      | right nin => ex_intro _ (x1 :: p') (path_step x0 x1 p' hedge hp' nin)
      | left hin =>
        let (p'', h) := strip x1 x1 p' hp' hin in
        ex_intro _ (x1 :: p'') (path_step x0 x1 p'' hedge (proj1 h) (proj2 h))
      end
    end
  end
in walk_to_path v0 w WALK).
failed_attempts:
refine (let vertices := GRAPH.vertices G in
let strip (a : vertices) : forall (b : vertices) (p : list vertices), path v b p -> L.In a p -> {p' : list vertices | path v a p' /\ ~ L.In a p'} :=
  fix rec b p hp (Hin : L.In a p) {struct hp} : {p' : list vertices | path v a p' /\ ~ L.In a p'} :=
    match hp with
    | path_refl => match Hin with end
    | path_step b0 b1 p' He Hp Hnotin =>
      match Hin with
      | L.In_eq _ _ => exist _ p' (conj Hp Hnotin)
      | L.In_cons _ _ Hin' => rec b1 p' Hp Hin'
      end
    end
in let walk_to_path (x : vertices) (l : list vertices) (hw : walk v x l) {struct l} : exists p : list vertices, path v x p :=
  match hw with
  | walk_refl => ex_intro _ nil (path_refl v)
  | walk_step x0 x1 l' hedge hwalk' =>
    match walk_to_path x1 l' hwalk' with
    | ex_intro _ p' hp' =>
      match In_dec x1 p' with
      | right nin => ex_intro _ (x1 :: p') (path_step x0 x1 p' hedge hp' nin)
      | left hin =>
        let (p'', h) := strip x1 x1 p' hp' hin in
        ex_intro _ (x1 :: p'') (path_step x0 x1 p'' hedge (proj1 h) (proj2 h))
      end
    end
  end
in walk_to_path v0 w WALK).
